description: Configuration file for the resist-lint custom linter.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON Schema for IDE autocomplete.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from linting (e.g. "*.test.ts", "*.d.ts").

include.description: Paths to include in linting (relative to workspace root).

overrides.description: File-specific rule overrides. Last matching override wins.

files.description: Glob patterns matching files to apply these overrides to.

rules.description: Rule-level severity overrides for matched files.

comments/require-blank-line-groups.description: Require blank lines between declaration and control flow statement groups

comments/require-section-marker-style.description: Section markers must use the canonical // === style

comments/require-section-order.description: File sections marked with // === headers must follow canonical order

complexity/array-size-warning.description: Warn on unbounded array growth in while(true) loops

complexity/no-await-in-loop.description: Avoid await inside loops — use Promise.all() for parallel execution

complexity/no-concat-in-loop.description: Avoid string concatenation (+=) or .concat() inside loops

complexity/no-filter-map-chain.description: Avoid .filter().map() chains — use a single-pass reduce or for...of

complexity/no-index-of-in-loop.description: Avoid .indexOf() inside loops — use Map or Set instead

complexity/no-nested-array-iteration.description: Avoid nested loops over arrays — O(n²) complexity

complexity/no-regex-in-loop.description: Compile regex outside loops — avoid new RegExp() in loop body

complexity/no-repeated-traversal.description: Combine multiple array passes (.filter + .map on same array) into a single pass

complexity/no-sort-in-loop.description: Avoid .sort() inside loops — O(n² log n) complexity

complexity/no-spread-in-reduce.description: Avoid object/array spread inside .reduce() — creates O(n²) copies

complexity/prefer-map-for-lookup.description: Use Map for repeated key lookups instead of multiple .find() calls

complexity/prefer-set-for-existence.description: Use Set for existence checks instead of .includes() in loops

complexity/recursive-depth.description: Recursive functions should include a depth/limit parameter

directives/max-suppressions-per-file.description: Warns when a file has more than 3 @ts-expect-error directives

directives/no-biome-ignore.description: Forbids biome-ignore directives — fix the code or adjust biome.json

directives/no-eslint-disable.description: Bans ESLint directives — this codebase does not use ESLint

directives/no-oxlint-ignore.description: Forbids oxlint directives — fix the code or adjust oxlint.json

directives/no-prettier-ignore.description: Bans Prettier directives — formatting is handled by Biome

directives/no-suppression-in-new-code.description: Warns on @ts-expect-error — new code should be properly typed

directives/no-ts-expect-error-on-any.description: Warns when @ts-expect-error suppresses errors on code using the any type

directives/no-ts-ignore.description: Bans @ts-ignore directives — use @ts-expect-error with an explanation instead

directives/no-ts-nocheck.description: Bans @ts-nocheck directives — file must have type-checking enabled

directives/no-type-assertion-chain.description: Disallow double type assertion chains (as unknown as / as any as)

directives/require-ts-expect-error-reaso.description: Requires @ts-expect-error directives to include an explanation of at least 10 characters

hygiene/no-bare-catch.description: Bare catch blocks that swallow errors are forbidden — always bind the error parameter.

imports/no-js-extension.description: Import paths must not use .js extension — use .ts or omit

imports/no-raw-node-imports.description: Use @/utils/core shared utilities instead of raw node:* imports

imports/no-reexport.description: Forbids re-exports — always import from canonical source

imports/no-relative-imports.description: Import paths must not use relative paths (./ or ../)

imports/require-import-groups.description: Require blank lines between import groups (node, external, workspace)

jsdoc/param-type-match.description: @param {Type} must match the actual TypeScript type annotation

jsdoc/require-example.description: Exported functions must have an @example block with ```typescript``` fence

jsdoc/require-jsdoc.description: Exported functions and types must have a JSDoc comment

jsdoc/require-module.description: Every TypeScript file must have a top-level /** @module */ JSDoc comment

jsdoc/require-param.description: Every function parameter must have a matching @param in JSDoc

jsdoc/require-returns.description: Exported functions with non-void return types must have @returns {Type}

jsdoc/require-schema-link.description: Types derived from Valibot schemas must include {@link SchemaName} in JSDoc

jsdoc/validate-example.description: TypeScript code in @example blocks must be syntactically valid

naming/camel-case-vars.description: Variables and functions must use camelCase

naming/constant-screaming-case.description: Top-level const with literal init must use SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE

naming/pascal-case-types.description: Types, interfaces, and enums must use PascalCase

naming/svelte-file-pascal-case.description: Svelte files must have PascalCase filenames

naming/ts-file-kebab-case.description: TypeScript files must have kebab-case filenames

primitives/division-by-zero.description: Potential division by zero - add check for zero divisor

primitives/no-array-hole.description: Array holes behave differently from undefined - use explicit undefined or remove element

primitives/no-array-index-string.description: String index on array creates object property, not array element

primitives/no-array-length-mutation.description: Direct .length mutation can lose data or create holes - use slice/splice

primitives/no-bigint-number-mix.description: Disallow mixing BigInt and number in arithmetic operations

primitives/no-compare-different-types.description: Comparison between different types uses implicit coercion - convert explicitly

primitives/no-date-arithmetic.description: Date arithmetic returns milliseconds - use date-fns or explicit getTime()

primitives/no-date-mutation.description: Date mutation methods are error-prone - create new Date or use date-fns

primitives/no-float-equality.description: Disallow direct equality comparison of floating-point numbers

primitives/no-in-operator-primitive.description: 'in' operator throws on primitives - check type first or use optional chaining

primitives/no-infinity-arithmetic.description: Disallow operations that may produce Infinity

primitives/no-json-bigint.description: JSON.parse without reviver may lose precision on large integers

primitives/no-json-circular.description: JSON.stringify may throw on circular structure - use safe-stringify or handle cycles

primitives/no-json-nan-infinity.description: JSON.stringify converts NaN/Infinity to null - validate or use replacer

primitives/no-json-undefined.description: JSON.stringify omits undefined values - use null or replacer function

primitives/no-lossy-math-operation.description: Lossy rounding pattern for decimal precision - use integers (cents) or decimal library

primitives/no-math-random-crypto.description: Math.random() is not cryptographically secure - use crypto.randomUUID() or crypto.getRandomValues()

primitives/no-modulo-negative.description: % operator with potentially negative number - JavaScript % is remainder, not modulo

primitives/no-new-date-string-parse.description: Date string parsing is inconsistent - use explicit constructor or date library

primitives/no-regex-on-untrusted.description: RegExp with user input is ReDoS vulnerability - escape input or use string methods

primitives/no-relational-null-undefined.description: Relational comparison with null/undefined has counterintuitive results

primitives/no-string-index-unicode.description: String indexing may split unicode characters - use [...str] or for...of

primitives/no-string-length-unicode.description: String .length counts UTF-16 code units, not characters - use [...str].length for unicode

primitives/no-toFixed-rounding.description: Warn against toFixed() due to inconsistent rounding behavior

primitives/object-is-for-special.description: Use Object.is() for -0 or NaN comparison, not ===

primitives/prefer-bigint-for-ids.description: Warn when ID fields in interfaces use number type

primitives/prefer-math-trunc.description: Math.floor() on potentially negative value - use Math.trunc() for consistent truncation toward zero

primitives/prefer-normalize-comparison.description: String comparison without normalize() - visually identical strings may have different encodings

primitives/use-number-is-integer.description: Enforce Number.isInteger() over manual x % 1 === 0 checks

result/check-before-access.description: Result .ok must be checked before accessing .data or .error

result/no-ignore-result.description: Result return values must be captured — do not ignore them

result/no-redundant-ok-guard.description: Redundant .ok guard — both branches return the same variable

result/no-result-fallback.description: Do not silently discard Result errors with fallback values

result/no-ternary-fallback.description: Forbids result.ok ? result.data : fallback — use if (!result.ok) return result

result/require-ok-return.description: Functions returning Result<T> must use ok()/okUnchecked()/err() in returns

result/require-result-type.description: Exported functions that might fail should return Result<T>

result/validate-function-input.description: Exported/handler functions should validate input with safeParse()

svelte5-config/cloudflare-adapter-settin.description: Cloudflare adapter should have explicit routes config for optimal deployment

svelte5-config/csp-headers.description: Consider adding CSP configuration for security

svelte5-config/kit-alias-consistency.description: Alias in svelte.config.js not found in tsconfig.json paths

svelte5-config/no-deprecated-options.description: Deprecated Svelte 4 config options should be removed

svelte5-config/no-inline-preprocess.description: Complex inline preprocessor should be extracted to a separate module

svelte5-config/no-node-adapter-cloudflar.description: Node.js adapter incompatible with Cloudflare Workers — use @sveltejs/adapter-cloudflare

svelte5-config/output-directory.description: Output directory conflicts with source directory

svelte5-config/require-adapter.description: SvelteKit config missing adapter — build will fail without one

svelte5-config/require-runes-mode.description: Svelte 5 project should have compilerOptions.runes: true

svelte5-config/static-adapter-for-capaci.description: Capacitor project requires @sveltejs/adapter-static — current adapter won't work

svelte5-config/trailing-slash-consistenc.description: Trailing slash handling not explicitly configured

svelte5-config/version-skew-handling.description: Consider adding version config for deployment updates

svelte5-config/vite-optimizeDeps.description: Svelte packages should not be excluded from Vite optimizeDeps

svelte5/no-create-event-dispatcher.description: createEventDispatcher is deprecated in Svelte 5 - use callback props instead

svelte5/no-effect-mutation.description: Unguarded $state mutation inside $effect may cause infinite loop

svelte5/no-inline-styles.description: Avoid inline styles - use CSS classes or style: directives

svelte5/no-legacy-event-handlers.description: Legacy event handler 'on:event' - use 'onevent' attribute instead

svelte5/no-legacy-props.description: Legacy prop declaration 'export let' - use $props() instead

svelte5/no-legacy-reactive-statements.description: Legacy reactive statement '$:' - use $derived or $effect instead

svelte5/no-legacy-slots.description: <slot> is deprecated in Svelte 5 - use snippets with {@render}

svelte5/no-reactive-class-properties.description: $state in class property makes all instances deeply reactive - ensure this is intentional

svelte5/no-rest-props-misuse.description: $$restProps is deprecated in Svelte 5 - use rest destructuring with $props()

svelte5/no-state-in-module-context.description: $state in module context creates shared state across all component instances

svelte5/no-untrack-misuse.description: untrack() used on non-reactive value - untrack is only needed for $state/$derived

svelte5/prefer-derived-by.description: Complex derivation should use $derived.by() for clarity

svelte5/prefer-derived-over-effect.description: $effect that only sets a value should use $derived instead

svelte5/require-bindable-for-bind.description: Props used with bind: must be declared as $bindable()

svelte5/require-each-key.description: {#each} block should have a key expression for stable identity

svelte5/require-effect-cleanup.description: $effect with subscriptions/timers must return a cleanup function

svelte5/require-snippet-typing.description: Snippet props should be typed as Snippet or Snippet<[...]>

testing/require-colocated-tests.description: Files exporting functions must have a colocated .test.ts file

typescript/lint-embedded-strings.description: Warns when template/string literals contain `<script>` blocks with embedded code

typescript/no-bare-as-cast.description: Every `as` cast must have an inline comment explaining why

typescript/no-bare-data-types.description: Data types must use Valibot schemas, not interface/type literals

typescript/no-builtin-types.description: Use Valibot types (Str, Num, Bool, Void) instead of TypeScript builtins

typescript/no-default-params.description: Function parameters must not have defaults or optional markers — use Valibot schemas

typescript/no-empty-catch.description: Catch blocks must use fromUnknownError() + err() pattern

typescript/no-generic-function-type.description: Function types must have specific parameter and return types, not generic unknown

typescript/no-module-side-effects.description: Top-level code must not throw or execute side-effect calls on import

typescript/no-throw.description: Forbids throw statements — use return err() instead

typescript/no-union-null.description: Use Valibot nullable/optional types instead of | null / | undefined

typescript/no-union-params.description: Function parameters must not use | union types — use Valibot schemas instead

typescript/require-const-comment.description: Every top-level const must have a preceding comment

typescript/require-function-schema.description: Use functionSchema() from @/schemas/function instead of v.custom for function types

typescript/require-non-negative-integer.description: .length must be typed as NonNegativeInteger, not Num

typescript/require-return-type.description: Every function must have an explicit return type annotation

typescript/require-svelte-ts-extension.description: Files using Svelte runes must use .svelte.ts extension

typescript/require-type-annotation.description: Every const/let declaration and function parameter must have a type annotation

valibot/await-async-parse.description: Async parse calls (parseAsync, safeParseAsync) must be awaited

valibot/colocate-schema-type.description: Type aliases using v.InferOutput<typeof XxxSchema> must colocate the schema

valibot/consistent-infer.description: Use v.InferOutput consistently; flag v.InferInput unless type name contains "Input"

valibot/consistent-nullability.description: Do not mix v.optional() and v.nullable() in the same schema object

valibot/discriminated-unions.description: Use v.variant() for discriminated unions instead of v.union()

valibot/error-map-all-locales.description: Error maps must include all supported locales

valibot/error-map-complete.description: Error maps should cover all schema fields

valibot/explicit-undefined.description: Optional fields should provide a default value — prefer v.optional(schema, default)

valibot/export-schema-and-type.description: Exported schemas must have a corresponding exported type

valibot/import-type-only.description: When importing types from valibot, use import type

valibot/limit-union-size.description: Warns when v.union() has more than 10 variants

valibot/namespace-import.description: Valibot must be imported as namespace: import * as v from 'valibot'

valibot/no-any-schema.description: Bans v.any() and v.unknown() — use a specific schema type instead

valibot/no-direct-safeparse.description: Forbids v.safeParse() — use safeParse from @/utils/result/safe instead

valibot/no-duplicate-keys.description: Detects duplicate property keys in v.strictObject() / v.object() calls

valibot/no-duplicate-schema.description: Schema field patterns appearing in 3+ files should be in @/schemas/common

valibot/no-empty-object.description: Bans empty v.object({}) and v.strictObject({}) calls

valibot/no-expensive-regex.description: Warns about potentially ReDoS-prone regex in v.regex()

valibot/no-fallback-required.description: Bans v.fallback() on required schemas — fallback defeats required validation

valibot/no-generic-string-schema.description: v.pipe(v.string(), v.minLength(1)) is too generic — add semantic constraints

valibot/no-ignore-issues.description: safeParse results should check .issues when the parse fails

valibot/no-inline-error-message.description: Bans inline string error messages in valibot validation methods

valibot/no-inline-infer.description: Do not use v.InferOutput<> inline in function signatures — declare a type alias

valibot/no-manual-types.description: Object literal type aliases should have a corresponding Valibot schema

valibot/no-mutate-after-parse.description: Bans mutation of parsed data — validated data should remain immutable

valibot/no-nested-optional.description: Bans nested v.optional(v.nullable(...)) — use v.nullish() instead

valibot/no-omit-pick-infer.description: Do not use Omit/Pick on valibot inferred types — use v.omit()/v.pick() instead

valibot/no-optional-heavy-object.description: Warns when >70% of fields in a schema object are optional/nullable

valibot/no-orphan-schemas.description: Every exported schema must have a corresponding exported type alias

valibot/no-orphan-types.description: Type aliases for data shapes should have corresponding Valibot schemas

valibot/no-parse.description: Forbids v.parse() — use safeParse from @/utils/result/safe instead

valibot/no-partial-infer.description: Do not use Partial<v.InferOutput<...>> — use v.partial() on the schema instead

valibot/no-passthrough.description: Bans v.passthrough() — unknown keys should not pass through validation

valibot/no-recursive-without-lazy.description: Recursive schemas must use v.lazy() to avoid runtime errors

valibot/no-reexport-infer.description: Do not re-export v.InferOutput/v.InferInput — export concrete types instead

valibot/no-schema-in-component.description: Bans schema definitions in .svelte files — move to dedicated schema files

valibot/no-schema-in-loop.description: Bans schema creation inside loops — define schemas once and reuse them

valibot/no-transform-side-effects.description: v.transform() callbacks must be pure — no console.log, fetch, etc.

valibot/no-type-cast-after-parse.description: Bans `as` casts on parse/safeParse results — schema already guarantees the type

valibot/no-unsafe-coerce.description: Bans v.coerce() — coercion silently transforms input and can mask data issues

valibot/one-schema-per-file.description: Files with too many schema definitions should be split

valibot/prefer-branded-types.description: Use v.brand() for ID/nominal types to prevent accidental mixing

valibot/prefer-methods.description: Use built-in Valibot methods instead of custom v.transform() calls

valibot/prefer-picklist.description: Use v.picklist() instead of v.union([v.literal(...), ...]) for literal unions

valibot/prefer-pipe.description: Use v.pipe() for chained validations instead of deprecated nested patterns

valibot/prefer-shared-schema.description: Use shared schemas (PathSchema, UrlStringSchema, etc.) for matching field names

valibot/prefer-template-literal.description: Prefer templateLiteral() over v.pipe(v.string(), v.regex()) for structured string patterns

valibot/readonly-parse-result.description: Parse results should be declared with const, not let

valibot/require-description.description: Schemas should have v.description() in their pipe

valibot/require-error-map.description: Schema files should have error map companions

valibot/require-error-mapping.description: Use mapIssues() after safeParse failures for user-friendly errors

valibot/require-field-docs.description: Every property in v.strictObject() must have a JSDoc comment

valibot/require-generic-schema.description: Schemas used by generic types should use generic() from @/schemas/generic

valibot/require-min-length.description: Bare v.string() in strictObject fields should have v.minLength(1)

valibot/require-schema-suffix.description: Valibot schema const names must end in "Schema"

valibot/revalidate-on-change.description: Data modified after parsing should be re-validated

valibot/schema-file-location.description: Schema definitions should live in designated directories or files

valibot/schema-type-pair.description: Every schema must have a corresponding type derived via v.InferOutput

valibot/type-alias-from-schema.description: Type aliases for data shapes must be derived from schemas using v.InferOutput

valibot/validate-boundaries.description: Exported functions should validate inputs at module boundaries

valibot/validate-function-output.description: Exported functions returning data should validate return values

package/no-hoisted-dep.description: Hoisted dependencies must not appear in sub-package dependencies

package/no-peer-deps.description: Private workspace packages must not have peerDependencies

package/no-root-only-scripts.description: qa:format, qa:format:check, qa:lint belong only in workspace root

package/no-ts-node.description: Disallow ts-node usage in dependencies and scripts

package/no-tsc-dependency.description: Packages using tsgo should not depend on typescript

package/no-vitest-config.description: Sub-packages must not have vitest.config.ts — use root config with --project

package/no-workspace-dep.description: Workspace-root-level deps must not appear in sub-package devDependencies

package/no-workspace-self-ref.description: Sub-packages must not have workspace:* dependencies — use tsconfig paths

package/require-project-test.description: Test scripts must use pnpm -w exec vitest run --project <name>

package/require-readme.description: Every sub-package must have a validated README.md

package/require-scope.description: Non-root packages must have a scoped name

package/require-shared-config.description: Config files must use shared config tooling

package/require-standard-scripts.description: Sub-packages must have all standard scripts

package/valid-project-ref.description: Scripts with --project must reference a valid vitest project name

package/valid-tsconfig.description: Sub-package tsconfig.json must extend root and include src

hygiene/no-dead-locale-keys.description: Every locale key must have at least one non-test, non-definition reference — remove dead keys to prevent locale bloat.

hygiene/no-duplicate-function-signatures.description: Exported functions must have unique names across the workspace — duplicates indicate missing shared abstractions.

hygiene/no-orphaned-exports.description: Exported symbols must have at least one non-test consumer — remove unused exports or wire them up.

package/names-valid.description: Package names must be valid npm names and unique across workspace.

plans/files-exist.description: Files declared as Create: in completed plan tasks must exist on disk — catches unwired/unimplemented features.

plans/no-empty-plan-sections.description: Task sections (Gap, Plan, Files, Verification) must contain meaningful content — not empty or minimal text.

plans/no-incomplete-tasks.description: Plan files older than maxAgeDays must have all tasks marked [x] — incomplete tasks indicate missed work.

plans/no-template-placeholders.description: Plan files must not contain leftover template placeholders — replace all placeholders with real content.

plans/require-concrete-verification.description: Verification sections must contain specific commands, file paths, or expected counts — not just generic "Tests pass" text.

plans/require-plan-structure.description: Plan files must have Status Legend, Baseline, Execution Order, and all 4 required tail tasks — mirrors hook validation at CI time.

plans/require-test-files.description: Implementation tasks that create/edit source files must declare test files — enforces TDD at the plan level.

plans/status-dependency-order.description: Task marked [x] must not depend on tasks that are still [ ] or [~] — dependencies must be completed first.

sync/filter-patterns.description: Turbo/pnpm filter patterns must match folder structure.

sync/lefthook-scripts.description: Lefthook pnpm commands must reference valid package.json scripts.

sync/onboarding-steps.description: Onboarding steps must be valid package.json scripts.

sync/pnpm-workspace.description: pnpm-workspace.yaml patterns must match actual packages.

sync/tsconfig-paths.description: TSConfig path aliases must point to existing files.

sync/turbo-tasks.description: Turbo task references in package.json scripts must exist in turbo.json.

sync/workflow-scripts.description: GitHub workflow pnpm commands must reference valid package.json scripts.

testing/require-e2e-location.description: E2E test files must live under e2e/ or tests/e2e/

testing/require-integration-location.description: Integration test files must be in tests/integration/ or colocated with source

vscode/no-hardcoded-brand.description: Hardcoded brand strings must use constants from brand.ts — ensures white-label readiness.

vscode/no-unlocalized-strings.description: User-facing messages must use locale strings from en — prevents unlocalized English strings.

vscode/no-unread-settings.description: Every setting in package.json contributes.configuration must be read via config.get — prevents phantom settings.

vscode/no-unwired-commands.description: Every command in brand.ts COMMANDS must have a registerCommand/registerTextEditorCommand call — prevents orphaned commands.

vscode/require-error-boundary.description: Use registerCommand() wrapper and extractMessage() utility — prevents raw error handling patterns.

workspace/cli-tools-help-version.description: All CLI executables must support --help and --version flags.

workspace/detect-undeclared-dependencies.description: Imports must reference packages declared in dependencies or devDependencies.

workspace/enforce-benchmark-file-naming.description: Benchmark files must live in __benchmarks__/ directories and use .benchmark.ts(x) naming.

workspace/enforce-branch-naming.description: Branch names must use standard prefixes (feature/, fix/, hotfix/, chore/, release/, test/, docs/).

workspace/enforce-conventional-commits.description: Commit messages must follow Conventional Commits format.

workspace/enforce-docs-location.description: Markdown files must be at repo root or under docs/.

workspace/enforce-docs-naming.description: Documentation files must use correct naming conventions.

workspace/enforce-git-config.description: Git configuration must match project policy.

workspace/enforce-peer-dependency-consis.description: Ensures peerDependencies are consistent across workspace packages.

workspace/enforce-test-file-naming.description: Test files must be in __tests__/ directories with .test.ts(x) naming.

workspace/enforce-workspace-version-alig.description: Workspace dependency version specifiers must match the declared major version of the target package.

workspace/gitlab-ci-file-required.description: .gitlab-ci.yml must exist at the project root.

workspace/gitlab-ci-includes-valid.description: All local include paths in .gitlab-ci.yml must resolve to existing files.

workspace/gitlab-ci-jobs-have-script.description: Every CI job must include a script: entry.

workspace/gitlab-ci-schema-header.description: All GitLab CI YAML files must include the required schema header.

workspace/gitlab-ci-stages-declared.description: Root .gitlab-ci.yml must contain a top-level stages: key.

workspace/gitlab-ci-stages-standard.description: CI files must declare all required stages in correct order.

workspace/gitlab-ci-standard-naming.description: CI job names and stage values must use approved conventions.

workspace/gitlab-ci-yaml-syntax.description: GitLab CI YAML files must be valid YAML.

workspace/ico-min-resolution.description: ICO files should have at least 64x64 resolution.

workspace/ico-optimal-palette.description: ICO files should use 256 or fewer colors.

workspace/ico-requires-multiresolution.description: ICO files should contain at least 3 resolution variants.

workspace/mr-automerge-not-enabled-by-de.description: Automerge must only be enabled after CI passes and reviewer approval.

workspace/mr-blocking-discussions.description: MR must not have unresolved discussions.

workspace/mr-branch-source-rules.description: MR source branch must follow naming conventions.

workspace/mr-cherry-pick-label.description: Cherry-pick/backport MRs must carry a matching label.

workspace/mr-ci-pipeline-passed.description: CI pipeline must be success status to merge.

workspace/mr-codeowners-approval.description: CODEOWNERS file must exist at expected path.

workspace/mr-config-changes-approved.description: Critical config file changes require the 'config-approved' label.

workspace/mr-conflicting-labels.description: MR must not have conflicting label pairs.

workspace/mr-dependency-changes-reviewed.description: Dependency file changes require deps-reviewed label.

workspace/mr-description-required.description: MR description must not be empty.

workspace/mr-draft-block.description: MR title must not start with Draft:.

workspace/mr-label-conflict-matrix.description: MR must not have conflicting label pairs from the conflict matrix.

workspace/mr-label-enforcement.description: MR must include at least one approved domain/scope label.

workspace/mr-label-format.description: MR labels must use lowercase kebab-case format.

workspace/mr-labels-required-per-scope.description: MR labels must match scoped paths modified in the MR.

workspace/mr-license-change-reviewed.description: License-related file changes require legal-approved label.

workspace/mr-no-force-push-after-review.description: Force-pushes must not occur after MR approval.

workspace/mr-open-too-long.description: MR should not remain open for an excessive number of days.

workspace/mr-release-label-required.description: MRs targeting release branches must carry the 'release' label.

workspace/mr-reviewer-required.description: MR must have at least one reviewer.

workspace/mr-sensitive-path-changes.description: Changes to sensitive file paths require MR approval.

workspace/validate-vscode-extensions.description: .vscode/extensions.json must match the approved extensions list.

workspace/validate-wrangler-config.description: Wrangler config bindings must have valid names and no duplicates.

workspace/validate-wrangler-cron-syntax.description: Wrangler cron triggers must use valid 5-field cron syntax.

workspace/validate-wrangler-environments.description: Wrangler environments must be limited to production and preview.

workspace/validate-yaml-schema-directive.description: YAML schema directives must reference valid URLs.

workspace/vitest-config-and-coverage.description: Enforce Vitest config, coverage, naming, and test hygiene.

workspace/vitest-config-and-usage.description: Enforce Vitest standards and config consistency.

workspace/vscode-brand-sync.description: VS Code extension package.json commands and settings must stay in sync with brand.ts constants.

workspace/warn-unused-gitignore-patterns.description: Gitignore patterns should match at least one file in the workspace.

workspace/warn-vscode-settings-conflicts.description: VSCode settings must not conflict with project configuration.

workspace/webp-no-color-profile.description: .webp files must not contain embedded ICC or EXIF color profiles.

workspace/webp-no-metadata.description: .webp files must not contain EXIF, XMP, or ICC metadata.

workspace/workspace-globs-resolve.description: Each workspace glob must resolve to an existing base directory.

workspace/workspace-packages-exist.description: Each workspace glob must match at least one workspace package.

workspace/workspace-paths-exist.description: Each workspace glob must point to an existing directory path.

workspace/workspace-spelling.description: Run cspell to detect spelling errors across the workspace.

workspace/workspace-valid.description: pnpm-workspace.yaml must be valid and contain workspace globs.

workspace/wrangler-authenticated.description: Wrangler CLI must be authenticated via wrangler login.

workspace/wrangler-binding-names-unique.description: Wrangler binding names must be unique across all wrangler.json files.

workspace/wrangler-binding-naming-conven.description: Wrangler binding names must follow naming conventions.

workspace/wrangler-bindings-consistent-e.description: Wrangler bindings must be consistent across all environments.

workspace/wrangler-main-entrypoint-exist.description: Wrangler main entrypoint must reference an existing file.

workspace/wrangler-name-matches-package.description: Wrangler name must match the sibling package.json name.

workspace/wrangler-tail-consumers-unique.description: Wrangler tail consumer service names must be globally unique.

ruleOptions.description:
Per-rule configuration options. Keys are rule IDs, values are option objects.

Common options:
- categories: string[] — override rule categories for filtering
- stages: string[] — override pipeline stages (lint, check, pre-commit, build, ci, test)

allowedTargets.description: Rule IDs that are allowed to be suppressed (e.g. "max-lines").

scope.description: Required scope prefix for package names (default: "@/").

localeFile.description: Suffix path to the locale definition file (default: "locale/en.ts").

localePrefix.description: Export name prefix for the locale object (default: "en").

allowedNames.description: Function names allowed to appear in multiple files.

maxAgeDays.description: Only warn on plans older than N days (default: 7).

rules.description: Rule ID → severity mapping. Unlisted rules default to "error".

comments/require-blank-line-groups.description: Require blank lines between declaration and control flow statement groups

comments/require-section-marker-style.description: Section markers must use the canonical // === style

comments/require-section-order.description: File sections marked with // === headers must follow canonical order

complexity/array-size-warning.description: Warn on unbounded array growth in while(true) loops

complexity/no-await-in-loop.description: Avoid await inside loops — use Promise.all() for parallel execution

complexity/no-concat-in-loop.description: Avoid string concatenation (+=) or .concat() inside loops

complexity/no-filter-map-chain.description: Avoid .filter().map() chains — use a single-pass reduce or for...of

complexity/no-index-of-in-loop.description: Avoid .indexOf() inside loops — use Map or Set instead

complexity/no-nested-array-iteration.description: Avoid nested loops over arrays — O(n²) complexity

complexity/no-regex-in-loop.description: Compile regex outside loops — avoid new RegExp() in loop body

complexity/no-repeated-traversal.description: Combine multiple array passes (.filter + .map on same array) into a single pass

complexity/no-sort-in-loop.description: Avoid .sort() inside loops — O(n² log n) complexity

complexity/no-spread-in-reduce.description: Avoid object/array spread inside .reduce() — creates O(n²) copies

complexity/prefer-map-for-lookup.description: Use Map for repeated key lookups instead of multiple .find() calls

complexity/prefer-set-for-existence.description: Use Set for existence checks instead of .includes() in loops

complexity/recursive-depth.description: Recursive functions should include a depth/limit parameter

directives/max-suppressions-per-file.description: Warns when a file has more than 3 @ts-expect-error directives

directives/no-biome-ignore.description: Forbids biome-ignore directives — fix the code or adjust biome.json

directives/no-eslint-disable.description: Bans ESLint directives — this codebase does not use ESLint

directives/no-oxlint-ignore.description: Forbids oxlint directives — fix the code or adjust oxlint.json

directives/no-prettier-ignore.description: Bans Prettier directives — formatting is handled by Biome

directives/no-suppression-in-new-code.description: Warns on @ts-expect-error — new code should be properly typed

directives/no-ts-expect-error-on-any.description: Warns when @ts-expect-error suppresses errors on code using the any type

directives/no-ts-ignore.description: Bans @ts-ignore directives — use @ts-expect-error with an explanation instead

directives/no-ts-nocheck.description: Bans @ts-nocheck directives — file must have type-checking enabled

directives/no-type-assertion-chain.description: Disallow double type assertion chains (as unknown as / as any as)

directives/require-ts-expect-error-reaso.description: Requires @ts-expect-error directives to include an explanation of at least 10 characters

hygiene/no-bare-catch.description: Bare catch blocks that swallow errors are forbidden — always bind the error parameter.

imports/no-js-extension.description: Import paths must not use .js extension — use .ts or omit

imports/no-raw-node-imports.description: Use @/utils/core shared utilities instead of raw node:* imports

imports/no-reexport.description: Forbids re-exports — always import from canonical source

imports/no-relative-imports.description: Import paths must not use relative paths (./ or ../)

imports/require-import-groups.description: Require blank lines between import groups (node, external, workspace)

jsdoc/param-type-match.description: @param {Type} must match the actual TypeScript type annotation

jsdoc/require-example.description: Exported functions must have an @example block with ```typescript``` fence

jsdoc/require-jsdoc.description: Exported functions and types must have a JSDoc comment

jsdoc/require-module.description: Every TypeScript file must have a top-level /** @module */ JSDoc comment

jsdoc/require-param.description: Every function parameter must have a matching @param in JSDoc

jsdoc/require-returns.description: Exported functions with non-void return types must have @returns {Type}

jsdoc/require-schema-link.description: Types derived from Valibot schemas must include {@link SchemaName} in JSDoc

jsdoc/validate-example.description: TypeScript code in @example blocks must be syntactically valid

naming/camel-case-vars.description: Variables and functions must use camelCase

naming/constant-screaming-case.description: Top-level const with literal init must use SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE

naming/pascal-case-types.description: Types, interfaces, and enums must use PascalCase

naming/svelte-file-pascal-case.description: Svelte files must have PascalCase filenames

naming/ts-file-kebab-case.description: TypeScript files must have kebab-case filenames

primitives/division-by-zero.description: Potential division by zero - add check for zero divisor

primitives/no-array-hole.description: Array holes behave differently from undefined - use explicit undefined or remove element

primitives/no-array-index-string.description: String index on array creates object property, not array element

primitives/no-array-length-mutation.description: Direct .length mutation can lose data or create holes - use slice/splice

primitives/no-bigint-number-mix.description: Disallow mixing BigInt and number in arithmetic operations

primitives/no-compare-different-types.description: Comparison between different types uses implicit coercion - convert explicitly

primitives/no-date-arithmetic.description: Date arithmetic returns milliseconds - use date-fns or explicit getTime()

primitives/no-date-mutation.description: Date mutation methods are error-prone - create new Date or use date-fns

primitives/no-float-equality.description: Disallow direct equality comparison of floating-point numbers

primitives/no-in-operator-primitive.description: 'in' operator throws on primitives - check type first or use optional chaining

primitives/no-infinity-arithmetic.description: Disallow operations that may produce Infinity

primitives/no-json-bigint.description: JSON.parse without reviver may lose precision on large integers

primitives/no-json-circular.description: JSON.stringify may throw on circular structure - use safe-stringify or handle cycles

primitives/no-json-nan-infinity.description: JSON.stringify converts NaN/Infinity to null - validate or use replacer

primitives/no-json-undefined.description: JSON.stringify omits undefined values - use null or replacer function

primitives/no-lossy-math-operation.description: Lossy rounding pattern for decimal precision - use integers (cents) or decimal library

primitives/no-math-random-crypto.description: Math.random() is not cryptographically secure - use crypto.randomUUID() or crypto.getRandomValues()

primitives/no-modulo-negative.description: % operator with potentially negative number - JavaScript % is remainder, not modulo

primitives/no-new-date-string-parse.description: Date string parsing is inconsistent - use explicit constructor or date library

primitives/no-regex-on-untrusted.description: RegExp with user input is ReDoS vulnerability - escape input or use string methods

primitives/no-relational-null-undefined.description: Relational comparison with null/undefined has counterintuitive results

primitives/no-string-index-unicode.description: String indexing may split unicode characters - use [...str] or for...of

primitives/no-string-length-unicode.description: String .length counts UTF-16 code units, not characters - use [...str].length for unicode

primitives/no-toFixed-rounding.description: Warn against toFixed() due to inconsistent rounding behavior

primitives/object-is-for-special.description: Use Object.is() for -0 or NaN comparison, not ===

primitives/prefer-bigint-for-ids.description: Warn when ID fields in interfaces use number type

primitives/prefer-math-trunc.description: Math.floor() on potentially negative value - use Math.trunc() for consistent truncation toward zero

primitives/prefer-normalize-comparison.description: String comparison without normalize() - visually identical strings may have different encodings

primitives/use-number-is-integer.description: Enforce Number.isInteger() over manual x % 1 === 0 checks

result/check-before-access.description: Result .ok must be checked before accessing .data or .error

result/no-ignore-result.description: Result return values must be captured — do not ignore them

result/no-redundant-ok-guard.description: Redundant .ok guard — both branches return the same variable

result/no-result-fallback.description: Do not silently discard Result errors with fallback values

result/no-ternary-fallback.description: Forbids result.ok ? result.data : fallback — use if (!result.ok) return result

result/require-ok-return.description: Functions returning Result<T> must use ok()/okUnchecked()/err() in returns

result/require-result-type.description: Exported functions that might fail should return Result<T>

result/validate-function-input.description: Exported/handler functions should validate input with safeParse()

svelte5-config/cloudflare-adapter-settin.description: Cloudflare adapter should have explicit routes config for optimal deployment

svelte5-config/csp-headers.description: Consider adding CSP configuration for security

svelte5-config/kit-alias-consistency.description: Alias in svelte.config.js not found in tsconfig.json paths

svelte5-config/no-deprecated-options.description: Deprecated Svelte 4 config options should be removed

svelte5-config/no-inline-preprocess.description: Complex inline preprocessor should be extracted to a separate module

svelte5-config/no-node-adapter-cloudflar.description: Node.js adapter incompatible with Cloudflare Workers — use @sveltejs/adapter-cloudflare

svelte5-config/output-directory.description: Output directory conflicts with source directory

svelte5-config/require-adapter.description: SvelteKit config missing adapter — build will fail without one

svelte5-config/require-runes-mode.description: Svelte 5 project should have compilerOptions.runes: true

svelte5-config/static-adapter-for-capaci.description: Capacitor project requires @sveltejs/adapter-static — current adapter won't work

svelte5-config/trailing-slash-consistenc.description: Trailing slash handling not explicitly configured

svelte5-config/version-skew-handling.description: Consider adding version config for deployment updates

svelte5-config/vite-optimizeDeps.description: Svelte packages should not be excluded from Vite optimizeDeps

svelte5/no-create-event-dispatcher.description: createEventDispatcher is deprecated in Svelte 5 - use callback props instead

svelte5/no-effect-mutation.description: Unguarded $state mutation inside $effect may cause infinite loop

svelte5/no-inline-styles.description: Avoid inline styles - use CSS classes or style: directives

svelte5/no-legacy-event-handlers.description: Legacy event handler 'on:event' - use 'onevent' attribute instead

svelte5/no-legacy-props.description: Legacy prop declaration 'export let' - use $props() instead

svelte5/no-legacy-reactive-statements.description: Legacy reactive statement '$:' - use $derived or $effect instead

svelte5/no-legacy-slots.description: <slot> is deprecated in Svelte 5 - use snippets with {@render}

svelte5/no-reactive-class-properties.description: $state in class property makes all instances deeply reactive - ensure this is intentional

svelte5/no-rest-props-misuse.description: $$restProps is deprecated in Svelte 5 - use rest destructuring with $props()

svelte5/no-state-in-module-context.description: $state in module context creates shared state across all component instances

svelte5/no-untrack-misuse.description: untrack() used on non-reactive value - untrack is only needed for $state/$derived

svelte5/prefer-derived-by.description: Complex derivation should use $derived.by() for clarity

svelte5/prefer-derived-over-effect.description: $effect that only sets a value should use $derived instead

svelte5/require-bindable-for-bind.description: Props used with bind: must be declared as $bindable()

svelte5/require-each-key.description: {#each} block should have a key expression for stable identity

svelte5/require-effect-cleanup.description: $effect with subscriptions/timers must return a cleanup function

svelte5/require-snippet-typing.description: Snippet props should be typed as Snippet or Snippet<[...]>

testing/require-colocated-tests.description: Files exporting functions must have a colocated .test.ts file

typescript/lint-embedded-strings.description: Warns when template/string literals contain `<script>` blocks with embedded code

typescript/no-bare-as-cast.description: Every `as` cast must have an inline comment explaining why

typescript/no-bare-data-types.description: Data types must use Valibot schemas, not interface/type literals

typescript/no-builtin-types.description: Use Valibot types (Str, Num, Bool, Void) instead of TypeScript builtins

typescript/no-default-params.description: Function parameters must not have defaults or optional markers — use Valibot schemas

typescript/no-empty-catch.description: Catch blocks must use fromUnknownError() + err() pattern

typescript/no-generic-function-type.description: Function types must have specific parameter and return types, not generic unknown

typescript/no-module-side-effects.description: Top-level code must not throw or execute side-effect calls on import

typescript/no-throw.description: Forbids throw statements — use return err() instead

typescript/no-union-null.description: Use Valibot nullable/optional types instead of | null / | undefined

typescript/no-union-params.description: Function parameters must not use | union types — use Valibot schemas instead

typescript/require-const-comment.description: Every top-level const must have a preceding comment

typescript/require-function-schema.description: Use functionSchema() from @/schemas/function instead of v.custom for function types

typescript/require-non-negative-integer.description: .length must be typed as NonNegativeInteger, not Num

typescript/require-return-type.description: Every function must have an explicit return type annotation

typescript/require-svelte-ts-extension.description: Files using Svelte runes must use .svelte.ts extension

typescript/require-type-annotation.description: Every const/let declaration and function parameter must have a type annotation

valibot/await-async-parse.description: Async parse calls (parseAsync, safeParseAsync) must be awaited

valibot/colocate-schema-type.description: Type aliases using v.InferOutput<typeof XxxSchema> must colocate the schema

valibot/consistent-infer.description: Use v.InferOutput consistently; flag v.InferInput unless type name contains "Input"

valibot/consistent-nullability.description: Do not mix v.optional() and v.nullable() in the same schema object

valibot/discriminated-unions.description: Use v.variant() for discriminated unions instead of v.union()

valibot/error-map-all-locales.description: Error maps must include all supported locales

valibot/error-map-complete.description: Error maps should cover all schema fields

valibot/explicit-undefined.description: Optional fields should provide a default value — prefer v.optional(schema, default)

valibot/export-schema-and-type.description: Exported schemas must have a corresponding exported type

valibot/import-type-only.description: When importing types from valibot, use import type

valibot/limit-union-size.description: Warns when v.union() has more than 10 variants

valibot/namespace-import.description: Valibot must be imported as namespace: import * as v from 'valibot'

valibot/no-any-schema.description: Bans v.any() and v.unknown() — use a specific schema type instead

valibot/no-direct-safeparse.description: Forbids v.safeParse() — use safeParse from @/utils/result/safe instead

valibot/no-duplicate-keys.description: Detects duplicate property keys in v.strictObject() / v.object() calls

valibot/no-duplicate-schema.description: Schema field patterns appearing in 3+ files should be in @/schemas/common

valibot/no-empty-object.description: Bans empty v.object({}) and v.strictObject({}) calls

valibot/no-expensive-regex.description: Warns about potentially ReDoS-prone regex in v.regex()

valibot/no-fallback-required.description: Bans v.fallback() on required schemas — fallback defeats required validation

valibot/no-generic-string-schema.description: v.pipe(v.string(), v.minLength(1)) is too generic — add semantic constraints

valibot/no-ignore-issues.description: safeParse results should check .issues when the parse fails

valibot/no-inline-error-message.description: Bans inline string error messages in valibot validation methods

valibot/no-inline-infer.description: Do not use v.InferOutput<> inline in function signatures — declare a type alias

valibot/no-manual-types.description: Object literal type aliases should have a corresponding Valibot schema

valibot/no-mutate-after-parse.description: Bans mutation of parsed data — validated data should remain immutable

valibot/no-nested-optional.description: Bans nested v.optional(v.nullable(...)) — use v.nullish() instead

valibot/no-omit-pick-infer.description: Do not use Omit/Pick on valibot inferred types — use v.omit()/v.pick() instead

valibot/no-optional-heavy-object.description: Warns when >70% of fields in a schema object are optional/nullable

valibot/no-orphan-schemas.description: Every exported schema must have a corresponding exported type alias

valibot/no-orphan-types.description: Type aliases for data shapes should have corresponding Valibot schemas

valibot/no-parse.description: Forbids v.parse() — use safeParse from @/utils/result/safe instead

valibot/no-partial-infer.description: Do not use Partial<v.InferOutput<...>> — use v.partial() on the schema instead

valibot/no-passthrough.description: Bans v.passthrough() — unknown keys should not pass through validation

valibot/no-recursive-without-lazy.description: Recursive schemas must use v.lazy() to avoid runtime errors

valibot/no-reexport-infer.description: Do not re-export v.InferOutput/v.InferInput — export concrete types instead

valibot/no-schema-in-component.description: Bans schema definitions in .svelte files — move to dedicated schema files

valibot/no-schema-in-loop.description: Bans schema creation inside loops — define schemas once and reuse them

valibot/no-transform-side-effects.description: v.transform() callbacks must be pure — no console.log, fetch, etc.

valibot/no-type-cast-after-parse.description: Bans `as` casts on parse/safeParse results — schema already guarantees the type

valibot/no-unsafe-coerce.description: Bans v.coerce() — coercion silently transforms input and can mask data issues

valibot/one-schema-per-file.description: Files with too many schema definitions should be split

valibot/prefer-branded-types.description: Use v.brand() for ID/nominal types to prevent accidental mixing

valibot/prefer-methods.description: Use built-in Valibot methods instead of custom v.transform() calls

valibot/prefer-picklist.description: Use v.picklist() instead of v.union([v.literal(...), ...]) for literal unions

valibot/prefer-pipe.description: Use v.pipe() for chained validations instead of deprecated nested patterns

valibot/prefer-shared-schema.description: Use shared schemas (PathSchema, UrlStringSchema, etc.) for matching field names

valibot/prefer-template-literal.description: Prefer templateLiteral() over v.pipe(v.string(), v.regex()) for structured string patterns

valibot/readonly-parse-result.description: Parse results should be declared with const, not let

valibot/require-description.description: Schemas should have v.description() in their pipe

valibot/require-error-map.description: Schema files should have error map companions

valibot/require-error-mapping.description: Use mapIssues() after safeParse failures for user-friendly errors

valibot/require-field-docs.description: Every property in v.strictObject() must have a JSDoc comment

valibot/require-generic-schema.description: Schemas used by generic types should use generic() from @/schemas/generic

valibot/require-min-length.description: Bare v.string() in strictObject fields should have v.minLength(1)

valibot/require-schema-suffix.description: Valibot schema const names must end in "Schema"

valibot/revalidate-on-change.description: Data modified after parsing should be re-validated

valibot/schema-file-location.description: Schema definitions should live in designated directories or files

valibot/schema-type-pair.description: Every schema must have a corresponding type derived via v.InferOutput

valibot/type-alias-from-schema.description: Type aliases for data shapes must be derived from schemas using v.InferOutput

valibot/validate-boundaries.description: Exported functions should validate inputs at module boundaries

valibot/validate-function-output.description: Exported functions returning data should validate return values

package/no-hoisted-dep.description: Hoisted dependencies must not appear in sub-package dependencies

package/no-peer-deps.description: Private workspace packages must not have peerDependencies

package/no-root-only-scripts.description: qa:format, qa:format:check, qa:lint belong only in workspace root

package/no-ts-node.description: Disallow ts-node usage in dependencies and scripts

package/no-tsc-dependency.description: Packages using tsgo should not depend on typescript

package/no-vitest-config.description: Sub-packages must not have vitest.config.ts — use root config with --project

package/no-workspace-dep.description: Workspace-root-level deps must not appear in sub-package devDependencies

package/no-workspace-self-ref.description: Sub-packages must not have workspace:* dependencies — use tsconfig paths

package/require-project-test.description: Test scripts must use pnpm -w exec vitest run --project <name>

package/require-readme.description: Every sub-package must have a validated README.md

package/require-scope.description: Non-root packages must have a scoped name

package/require-shared-config.description: Config files must use shared config tooling

package/require-standard-scripts.description: Sub-packages must have all standard scripts

package/valid-project-ref.description: Scripts with --project must reference a valid vitest project name

package/valid-tsconfig.description: Sub-package tsconfig.json must extend root and include src

hygiene/no-dead-locale-keys.description: Every locale key must have at least one non-test, non-definition reference — remove dead keys to prevent locale bloat.

hygiene/no-duplicate-function-signatures.description: Exported functions must have unique names across the workspace — duplicates indicate missing shared abstractions.

hygiene/no-orphaned-exports.description: Exported symbols must have at least one non-test consumer — remove unused exports or wire them up.

package/names-valid.description: Package names must be valid npm names and unique across workspace.

plans/files-exist.description: Files declared as Create: in completed plan tasks must exist on disk — catches unwired/unimplemented features.

plans/no-empty-plan-sections.description: Task sections (Gap, Plan, Files, Verification) must contain meaningful content — not empty or minimal text.

plans/no-incomplete-tasks.description: Plan files older than maxAgeDays must have all tasks marked [x] — incomplete tasks indicate missed work.

plans/no-template-placeholders.description: Plan files must not contain leftover template placeholders — replace all placeholders with real content.

plans/require-concrete-verification.description: Verification sections must contain specific commands, file paths, or expected counts — not just generic "Tests pass" text.

plans/require-plan-structure.description: Plan files must have Status Legend, Baseline, Execution Order, and all 4 required tail tasks — mirrors hook validation at CI time.

plans/require-test-files.description: Implementation tasks that create/edit source files must declare test files — enforces TDD at the plan level.

plans/status-dependency-order.description: Task marked [x] must not depend on tasks that are still [ ] or [~] — dependencies must be completed first.

sync/filter-patterns.description: Turbo/pnpm filter patterns must match folder structure.

sync/lefthook-scripts.description: Lefthook pnpm commands must reference valid package.json scripts.

sync/onboarding-steps.description: Onboarding steps must be valid package.json scripts.

sync/pnpm-workspace.description: pnpm-workspace.yaml patterns must match actual packages.

sync/tsconfig-paths.description: TSConfig path aliases must point to existing files.

sync/turbo-tasks.description: Turbo task references in package.json scripts must exist in turbo.json.

sync/workflow-scripts.description: GitHub workflow pnpm commands must reference valid package.json scripts.

testing/require-e2e-location.description: E2E test files must live under e2e/ or tests/e2e/

testing/require-integration-location.description: Integration test files must be in tests/integration/ or colocated with source

vscode/no-hardcoded-brand.description: Hardcoded brand strings must use constants from brand.ts — ensures white-label readiness.

vscode/no-unlocalized-strings.description: User-facing messages must use locale strings from en — prevents unlocalized English strings.

vscode/no-unread-settings.description: Every setting in package.json contributes.configuration must be read via config.get — prevents phantom settings.

vscode/no-unwired-commands.description: Every command in brand.ts COMMANDS must have a registerCommand/registerTextEditorCommand call — prevents orphaned commands.

vscode/require-error-boundary.description: Use registerCommand() wrapper and extractMessage() utility — prevents raw error handling patterns.

workspace/cli-tools-help-version.description: All CLI executables must support --help and --version flags.

workspace/detect-undeclared-dependencies.description: Imports must reference packages declared in dependencies or devDependencies.

workspace/enforce-benchmark-file-naming.description: Benchmark files must live in __benchmarks__/ directories and use .benchmark.ts(x) naming.

workspace/enforce-branch-naming.description: Branch names must use standard prefixes (feature/, fix/, hotfix/, chore/, release/, test/, docs/).

workspace/enforce-conventional-commits.description: Commit messages must follow Conventional Commits format.

workspace/enforce-docs-location.description: Markdown files must be at repo root or under docs/.

workspace/enforce-docs-naming.description: Documentation files must use correct naming conventions.

workspace/enforce-git-config.description: Git configuration must match project policy.

workspace/enforce-peer-dependency-consis.description: Ensures peerDependencies are consistent across workspace packages.

workspace/enforce-test-file-naming.description: Test files must be in __tests__/ directories with .test.ts(x) naming.

workspace/enforce-workspace-version-alig.description: Workspace dependency version specifiers must match the declared major version of the target package.

workspace/gitlab-ci-file-required.description: .gitlab-ci.yml must exist at the project root.

workspace/gitlab-ci-includes-valid.description: All local include paths in .gitlab-ci.yml must resolve to existing files.
